allow: Bash(node -e "const d=[];process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{try{const r=JSON.parse\(d.join\(''''''''\)\); console.log\(''''Port 3001 - Total:'''', r.total\)}catch{console.log\(''''Port 3001 - Not JSON''''\)}}\)")
